description: Create a multi-file Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\med_scraper\ that extracts medical identifiers from selected text and logs them to C:\workspace\data\literature_review.csv. The module must include a Python file (med_scraper.py) defining a custom action user.scrape_literature_ids(text: str) and a Talon file (med_scraper.talon) implementing the voice command "scrape identifiers". The extraction logic should identify PMIDs (1-8 digits), DOIs (starting with 10. followed by 4-9 digits, a slash, and alphanumeric/special characters), and NCT IDs (NCT followed by 8 digits), appending them to the CSV in Type,Value format. Use the open Notepad file to test the command's ability to capture selected text and process the identifiers.
